accountReport.printIntroAria: About this guardian financial account statement
accountReport.printIntroTitle: Guardian account statement — fees & payments reference
accountReport.printIntro: This printed document is a financial account statement for the guardian. It shows charges (amounts owed), payments and discounts, transactions listed by student, savings entries, and the current balance. Use it to review the account, reconcile payments, and plan settlements.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.subtitle: Ask about students, registration reports, attendance, and parent messages. Tools run on the server only — the OpenAI API key never reaches the browser.
